<div id="derek-hero">'''Welcome to Derek Davis'''<br/><span class="hero-sub">the personal knowledge base compiled from diary entries and research.</span><br/><span class="hero-stats">[[Special:AllPages|Browse all articles]] · [[Special:Categories|All categories]] · [[Special:RecentChanges|Recent changes]]</span></div>

{| class="derek-main-layout"
|-
| class="derek-col-left" |

{| class="derek-panel"
|-
! class="derek-panel-header" | Featured article
|-
| class="derek-panel-body" |
''Set a featured article — edit [[Main_Page]], paste a short excerpt from any article and add a link.''
|}

{| class="derek-panel"
|-
! class="derek-panel-header" | Browse by category
|-
| class="derek-panel-body" |
; Artifacts
* [[:Category:Artifacts|Browse artifacts]]
; Assessments
* [[:Category:Assessments|Browse assessments]]
; Audiences
* [[:Category:Audiences|Browse audiences]]
; Books
* [[:Category:Books|Browse books]]
; People
* [[:Category:People|Browse people]]
; Health & Life
* [[:Category:Health|Browse health & life]]
|}

| class="derek-col-right" |

{| class="derek-panel"
|-
! class="derek-panel-header" | Recently updated
|-
| class="derek-panel-body" |
[[Special:RecentChanges|View all recent changes →]]
|}

{| class="derek-panel"
|-
! class="derek-panel-header" | About
|-
| class="derek-panel-body" |
Derek Davis is a personal knowledge wiki compiled from diary entries and research. Articles represent synthesized knowledge and patterns — not events.
|}

|}

__NOTOC__
__NOEDITSECTION__
